<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{orgId}/contracts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the organization's contract inventory, optionally filtered by namespace, naming status, or limit.
